rationale: The cited paper appears as part of a grouped citation in the discussion section to illustrate that monitoring has been examined in prior marketing contexts (buyer-seller relationships). The citing paper's core theory, hypotheses, and empirical design are built around analyst forecasts and agency-theoretic monitoring and bonding costs, drawing primarily on agency, accounting, and governance sources. There is no distinct use of Heide et al. (2007)'s specific constructs, mechanisms, measures, or findings in the model development or testing.
